fishbone "Bottom-only compact — dashboard widget"
effect "搜索结果点击率下降"

config sides = bottom
config density = compact
config slope = gentle

category content "内容"
category ranking "排序"
category ux "体验"

content : "缺少结构化摘要"
content : "标题关键词弱"
ranking : "新排序模型上线"
ranking : "CTR 正向样本少"
ux : "首屏广告挤压"
ux : "移动端字号小"
